_comment: Curated model allowlist + display/provenance for the LIVE eval_master* files (new-era board).
Each entry: {pattern, display?, train_reasoning?, group?, note?}.
pattern        = case-insensitive SUBSTRING matched vs a row's served PATH or display;
a row is KEPT iff it matches any pattern (first match wins for display/treas).
display        = clean name shown in the board's `display` column.
train_reasoning= yes|no|NA — TRAINED on reasoning data (curated; not in eval_matrix).
group          = ordering bucket; ROWS APPEAR IN THIS FILE'S ORDER, and a BLANK ROW is
inserted between groups in the board CSV. Rows within a group keep file order
note           = free-text rationale (not shown on the board).
vo_path        = served checkpoint PATH this model's VO/obs/stage2 files resolve to. SINGLE
SOURCE OF TRUTH for the visual-obs filename->model join: the compiler builds
VO_FILE_TO_MODEL from these, and reasoner_sweep.sh derives its obs->stage2
targets from them (no hardcoded model lists in scripts). Omit for a model with
no VO checkpoint (bare baselines resolve via their own tokens in the compiler).

models.note: bare upstream; benchmarks+VO REUSED, only 1506 aux re-run
fresh 1506 aux run-id (job 93607)
bare upstream; benchmarks+VO REUSED, only 1506 aux re-run
fresh 1506 aux run-id (when nodes free)

CEILING/reference row (2026-07-07), 1806 cohort: 397B REASONING over the PRECOMPUTED GT observations (oracle_2906_merged_k5majority_categorical_1806_test.json fed as stage-1 via --precomputed-visual-obs) — i.e. 'what if stage-2 always got perfect stage-1 obs'. NOT agreement (obs IS the GT here, agreement would be trivial/undefined) — this populates vo_s1/vo_s2 severity metrics instead, distinct from the 1105 agreement-only ceiling row below. 2260/2260 samples, 0 failures. Raw (v1): severity_acc=0.7715, severity_mae=0.3614, err_f1=0.7441. v2 (evaluate_vo rescore, name-join fix): severity_acc=0.7779, severity_mae=0.3543, err_f1=0.7461. LISTED BEFORE the plain-397B/agreement-ceiling entries below because its pattern is a substring of the plain-397B vo_path — first-match order matters here, don't reorder without re-testing.

2026-07-09/10: 397B GT-VObs reasoning run on the SAME test BUILD as the EXP-B flipfix comparison (2906 k5majority GT obs inlined, byte-exact trained prompt, expb_stage2_from_raw_ondemand_test_flagkeep). Topped off via --resume to N=2157/2157, 0 failed; _v2 rescored. Final: err-F1=74.14, severity_acc=77.40. Distinct row from the 'Oracle 397B visual-obs cat (ceiling, GT-fed s1) [1806]' row (different run/test build). ROUTED VIA RUN-CARD since 2026-07-10 (stabilization step 8): the result files carry <file>.card.json with checkpoint_path=/mnt/data/shared/models/Qwen3.5-397B-A17B + arm=compare_gtobs, so the row keys on the REAL path (…__cohort_1806__arm_compare_gtobs) — the synthetic COMPARE_397B_GTOBS_1806 vo_path is RETIRED. This entry sits EARLY in the file so the broad 'shared/models/qwen3.5-397b' pattern can't hijack the display match (first-match-wins); board_order=34 keeps the row in Sandra's requested final-3 board position (397B / flipfix step840 / bigger-mix-2906).

models.display: Qwen3.5-397B (distillation target; plain obs not oracle)
models.note: distillation target. Board vo_s2 = 47.52 (sft2812 reasoner over 397B PLAIN obs); single-stage plain VO err-F1 45.21. NOTE: the historical 0.788 'oracle ceiling' (base-27B reasoner over 397B ORACLE obs) is EXCLUDED by the sft2812-only s2 policy — it is NOT what this row shows. HEAVY serve (TP8)

CEILING/reference row: the 397B ORACLE visual-obs (categorical) scored vs HUMAN GT — the agreement side=b (b=oracle) constant present in every testonly agreement file. Agree-F1 0.8608 / Acc 0.9177 / Prec 0.8619 / Rec 0.8597. NOT a deployable model: it's the oracle-obs-vs-human upper bound the SFT models are distilled toward. Distinct from the 397B-plain row above (that's side=a, the model run plain, agree-F1 33.07). 1105 cohort only.

models.display: 27B EXP-B stage-2 ondemand reasoner step562 (MODEL-obs arm) ⚠️ L/R-INVERTED
models.note: EXP-B native stage-2 reasoner, step562 — MODEL-obs drop-in arm (GATE-B second condition): two-stage stance eval on repetitions_test with REAL stage-1 obs from the 4B vobs2906 bake-off winner (categorical_k5majority step987, thinkoff), N=2157. FAILED the >=55.1 drop-in bar (err-F1 45.07 vs the GT-obs arm's 75.90 on the SAME checkpoint) -- see 2026-07-06_expb_gateb_gtobs_eval.md SS7. Distinct row from the GT-obs arm by design (different eval condition, not a competing file for one cell).

models.display: 27B EXP-B stage-2 ondemand reasoner step281 (SELF-LOOP arm) ⚠️ L/R-INVERTED
models.note: EXP-B native stage-2 reasoner, step281 -- SELF-LOOP arm (3rd eval condition, 2026-07-06): checkpoint answers its OWN stage-1 categorical Q/A prompt (untrained task, live model call) then consumes those self-generated observations in its own stage-2 stance call. WORST of the 3 arms (err-F1 16.79/23.89/23.76 for step281/562/840 vs GT-obs 73.54/75.90/75.50 and model-obs 45.07 @step562) -- the model cannot bootstrap usable stage-1 obs on a task it never trained on. See 2026-07-06_expb_gateb_gtobs_eval.md SS9-10.

models.note: EXP-B native stage-2 reasoner (thinkON, ondemand stance). vo_s2 here = GT-obs arm: single-pass on the test BUILD (2906 k5majority GT obs inlined, byte-exact trained prompt), N=2157. NOT sft2812-reasoner two-stage. See the separate 'step562 (MODEL-obs arm)' row for the real-stage-1-obs drop-in result (FAILED, err-F1 45.07). Agreement (2026-07-07): eval_all.sh's auto-agreement stage from the 07-07 full-eval run generated its own dedicated stage-1 obs (NOT the single-stage severity file) and scored it vs 1806 human GT -- micro-F1 21.30%, n=3213, acc=68.04%. ⚠️ L/R-INVERSION (found 2026-07-07): this stage-1 obs was self-generated by the mirror-trained checkpoint -- the 21.30% agreement number is ALSO compromised (same defect class as the SELF-LOOP arm), disregard — redo after the _flipfix retrain.

models.note: EXP-B native stage-2 reasoner (thinkON, ondemand stance). vo_s2 here = GT-obs arm: single-pass on the test BUILD (2906 k5majority GT obs inlined, byte-exact trained prompt), N=2157. NOT sft2812-reasoner two-stage.

L/R-inversion-FIXED retrain (2026-07-08/09, job 110073, 1-node TP4xDP2). ONE row carrying THREE axes of the same checkpoint+cohort evaluation (2026-07-09: consolidated from 3 separate master_models.json entries into 1, after the compiler stopped `__arm_`-suffixing the plain agreement/single-stage files for this checkpoint — see Family column, `2-stage-GT-VObs;Single-stage;VObs-agreement`): (1) 2-stage GT-VObs arm — single-pass on the test BUILD (2906 k5majority GT obs inlined, byte-exact trained prompt), N=2157, via stage2_..._gtobsbuild_thinkon_v2.json; (2) VObs-agreement — the checkpoint answers its own ~10 VObs Q/A pairs per rep (untrained task, live call) scored vs 1806 human GT, via agreement_..._agree_1806_thinkon.json (files renamed 2026-07-09, single-stage sibling renamed same day to add the missing _1806 cohort tag so it joins onto this row); (3) Single-stage severity arm (model emits severity directly, no stage-1 obs) + aux-task legs, via ..._1806_singlestage_thinkon_v2.json. Trained on need_to_flip-backfilled + regenerated (2 teachers: 397B+gemini-3-flash) + re-judged (85.2% accept) + clock-timestamp-leak-cleaned traces: expb_stage2_train_ondemand_flagkeep_reasoning_flipfix_sft_ready_clean (8977 rows). Side-agreement checker: 99.8% (403/404) vs the pre-fix 61% inversion rate. Compare vo_s2 err-F1 directly against the OLD (inverted) step840 row -- same test set/N/thinking, only the L/R defect differs. See ~/.claude/reports/visual_observations/2026-07-07_expb_stage2_lr_inversion_audit.md + ~/.claude/reports/post_training/2026-07-08_expb_stage2_flipfix_sft_1node_strategy_change.md.

Stage-1 SFT on the 8-source bigger mix (174,287 rows: VObs categorical+angle k5majority(+1q) 104,091 / mix_12k_2906 train 13,900 / 1105_binary_test_split_1806testfiltered_flipready 20,738-post-drop / llm_fms_reasoning_judged_passonly 15,558 / repfe_comparison_nothink_20k 20,000). Config sft_vlm_qwen35_27b_stage1_vobs_bigger_mix_2906_megatron.yaml, TP4xDP8 4-node, thinkOFF (no enable_thinking field), lr5e-6 cosine, 3 planned epochs / 16,011 total steps. Job 109701 CANCELLED by user choice at ~28% (step 4521/16011) after step_5337 (epoch-1 save, save_period=5337) had already landed — curves were textbook (train loss 0.28-0.40, val falling 0.347@1780->0.2996@3560, no overfit), stop was a deliberate '1 checkpoint is enough' call, not a training problem. CAVEAT (2026-07-09, /check-settings row 3, verified from 20 sampled actual training rows not the config comment): NOT 100% clean thinkoff — 15/20 no <think> tag, 2/20 empty <think></think> wrapper (mix_12k_2906 video subset, harmless), 3/20 REAL substantive <think> reasoning 300-527 chars (llm_fms source, ~9% of the mix) — confirmed genuine model-target reasoning (not judge/repair artifact) by direct message inspection. Serve/eval decision unchanged (thinkOFF still matches the ~90%+ majority) but noted here since it may show as reasoning leakage in raw thinkoff outputs. ONE row will carry multiple VObs axes as they land (Single-stage / 2-stage-GT-VObs / 2-stage-FIXED-REASONER-VObs via sft2812 / 2-stage-OWN-MODEL-VObs selfloop / VObs-agreement), categorical schema only, 1806 test cohort N~2157, per the eval plan frozen 2026-07-09. See project_vobs_oracle_cot_unknown_1806.md.
